prompt: A dimly lit party room. Every person stands slightly apart from the main crowd, alone at the edges, gazing toward a dense laughing group in the center. But when you look closely, the dense group in the center is itself made up of people who are also looking toward other groups. Every person simultaneously belongs to the crowd and stands outside it. Cinematic, photorealistic, warm interior light, shallow depth of field. No text, no labels, no numbers.
visual_logic: Every person at the party stands apart gazing at a crowd — but the crowd is made of those same isolated figures. Each person is simultaneously the outsider and the group, embodying the paradox structurally.
